evals.prompt: I need a settings form for a Next.js app using shadcn/ui. It should have: a text input for display name, an email input, a select dropdown for language (English, Spanish, French, Japanese), a switch for email notifications, and a checkbox for agreeing to terms. Use React Hook Form with Zod validation - name required min 2 chars, email required valid format, language required, terms must be checked. Show validation errors inline. Add a submit button that logs the form data.
evals.expected_output: A complete React component using shadcn/ui Form components with React Hook Form, Zod schema, and proper imports from @/components/ui/*. Should NOT use raw @base-ui/react imports for form elements.
expectations: Uses shadcn/ui Form, FormField, FormItem, FormLabel, FormControl, FormMessage components
Imports from @/components/ui/ paths, not directly from @base-ui/react for form elements
Uses zodResolver with a Zod schema for validation
Uses useForm from react-hook-form
Includes Select component from shadcn/ui (not raw Base UI Select)
Includes Switch component from shadcn/ui
Includes Checkbox component from shadcn/ui
Has 'use client' directive at the top

evals.prompt: Build me a confirmation dialog in Next.js with shadcn/ui that opens when a user clicks a 'Delete Account' button. Inside the dialog, there should be a popover that shows additional info when the user hovers over a help icon. The dialog should have a title, description, and Cancel/Confirm buttons. The popover should explain what happens when you delete your account. Use proper accessibility patterns.
evals.expected_output: A component using shadcn/ui Dialog and Popover components. Should use shadcn/ui wrappers, understand the Base UI Portal>Positioner>Popup pattern conceptually, but implement through shadcn abstractions.
expectations: Uses shadcn/ui Dialog components (DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription, DialogFooter)
Uses shadcn/ui Popover components (Popover, PopoverTrigger, PopoverContent)
Does NOT import directly from @base-ui/react for Dialog or Popover
Includes proper accessibility attributes or relies on shadcn's built-in a11y
Has Cancel and Confirm action buttons in the dialog
Has 'use client' directive

evals.prompt: Create a data table component in Next.js with shadcn/ui that displays a list of users (name, email, role, status). Add column sorting by clicking headers, and a dropdown menu on each row for actions (Edit, Delete, View Profile). Use TypeScript with proper types. Include some sample data.
evals.expected_output: A component using shadcn/ui Table, DropdownMenu components with TypeScript types. Should use shadcn/ui patterns for the table and menus, not raw Base UI.
expectations: Uses shadcn/ui Table components (Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell)
Uses shadcn/ui DropdownMenu for row actions
Imports from @/components/ui/ paths
Includes TypeScript interface or type for the user data
Implements sorting logic for at least one column
Includes sample user data array
Has 'use client' directive
